outline.caption: Streamline your VA school certification process with VASCO Assistant Pro. Automate, track compliance, and support student veterans. Get pre-launch pricing and sign up for our waitlist now.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is the fifth one, which could benefit from a more compelling headline to match the others. A stronger call to action might also enhance the urgency of the pre-launch offer.
